title: Sales Manager Vacancy at MagicBricks - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at MagicBricks - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? MagicBricks in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MagicBricks:
MagicBricks is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks!
